forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly before dawn then tending northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Becoming cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the eastern border, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of morning fog near the coast. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then turning northwesterly 25 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Light winds.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the eastern border, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly during the morning and early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning then becoming northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly during the morning then increasing to 30 to 45 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of thunderstorms near the west coast in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the west coast, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast in the evening. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Woomera in the afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly and light becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Woomera, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Stuart Highway in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Mostly clear. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeasterly in the middle of the day then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 24.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
